message:
feat(beads-viewer): responsive card layout for tables on mobile viewports

Add mobile-first responsive table CSS that transforms standard bv-table
elements into stacked card layouts at viewport widths below 640px:

- Hide thead on mobile, stack each row as a card with 2-column key/value
  grid using data-label attributes for column headers
- Alternating row backgrounds, rounded corners, and subtle shadows for
  card distinction
- Scrollbar styling and overflow handling for wide content

JavaScript enhancements in viewer.js to support the responsive system
with dynamic data-label injection from table headers.

New Playwright test (beads-viewer-tables.spec.ts) validating the
responsive table rendering and data-label attribute propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
